title: UDF template "reverse(ra1:str):str" seems broken
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, str_col VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, nullable_col VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, str_col, nullable_col) VALUES (1, 'hello world', NULL), (2, 'this is a test', 'sample text'), (3, NULL, 'another test');
SELECT REVERSE(str_col) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT REVERSE(COALESCE(nullable_col, 'default value')) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT REVERSE('boundary test') AS reversed_boundary, REVERSE(NULL::VARCHAR) AS reversed_null;
key_bug_features: UDF template 'reverse' fails on string input
